title: Cursor, insertion point, and fixing mistakes
drDigitalIntro: When you type, watch for the blinking line called the insertion point — that's where your next letter will appear. The cursor is the arrow you move with the trackpad; click somewhere to place the insertion point there. Made a mistake? No problem — just use Delete to erase it and type again. Everyone makes typos!
drDigitalSuccess: Now you know how to see where you're typing and fix any slip-ups!
drDigitalHint: Take your time reading through this, then click Continue whenever you're ready.
